newItems.headline: Rocket Lab launches Electron mission for a confidential EO customer

explainer.tagline: Electron flew again with a dedicated smallsat payload.
explainer.what_happened: Rocket Lab launched an Electron from Launch Complex 1. The payload reached its target orbit per the company webcast.
explainer.why_it_matters: Dedicated smallsat launch cadence affects EO constellation deployment schedules and rideshare pricing leverage.
